runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Python", "build_system": "pip", "package_manager": "pip", "build_commands": ["pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade -r /app/requirements.txt"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "3.12", "system_packages": ["build-essential", "gcc", "libssl-dev", "libffi-dev", "curl"]}, "repo_type": "web_service", "base_image": "python:3.12.13-bookworm", "base_image_rationale": "Official Python base image with Debian bookworm, suitable for running a FastAPI/UVicorn app and installing dependencies from requirements.txt.", "pitfalls": ["cryptography may require a Rust toolchain for building from source; wheels might not be available for Python 3.12 on all platforms.", "Python 3.12 compatibility with certain dependencies (e.g., SQLModel/SQLAlchemy versions) may require pinning specific versions if issues arise."], "notes": "This blueprint targets the backend container path (docker/Dockerfile.backend). The docker-compose file also includes backend-worker and web services; ensure corresponding Dockerfiles for those services align with the official Python base image strategy."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM python:3.11-bookworm

# Environment
ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Working directory
WORKDIR /app

# System dependencies (for building Python packages and common libs)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        gcc \
        libssl-dev \
        libffi-dev \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python dependencies
COPY backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip setuptools wheel \
    && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Copy project code and install editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

# Expose port and health check
EXPOSE 8080

# Create a non-root user for better security
RUN useradd -m appuser
RUN chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

# Healthcheck and startup
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=15s --retries=3 CMD curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/openapi.json || exit 1

# Start the FastAPI server with Uvicorn
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM python:3.12.13-bookworm

# System dependencies (including Rust toolchain for cryptography builds)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates \
    rustc cargo \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies
COPY ./backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt
# Workaround: override Celery version to a compatible one due to PyPI metadata issues
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir "Celery<5.3"

# Install local editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

# Copy backend code
COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

ENV PORT 8080
EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM python:3.12.13-bookworm

# System dependencies (including Rust toolchain for cryptography builds)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates \
    rustc cargo \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies
COPY ./backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip
# Pre-install a compatible Celery to bypass PyPI metadata issues with Celery==5.2.0
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir "Celery<5.3"
# Install remaining requirements (without attempting to reinstall Celery which is pre-installed)
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --no-deps -r /app/requirements.txt

# Workaround: If Celery metadata issues persist, the above should ensure a compatible Celery version is installed.

# Install local editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

# Copy backend code
COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

ENV PORT 8080
EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM python:3.12.13-bookworm

# System dependencies (including Rust toolchain for cryptography builds)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates \
    rustc cargo \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies
COPY ./backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip
# Workaround: relax Celery pin to avoid PyPI metadata issues (install latest <5.3)
RUN sed -i 's/Celery==5.2.0/Celery<5.3/' /app/requirements.txt
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Install local editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

# Copy backend code
COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

ENV PORT 8080
EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "docker/Dockerfile.backend", "content": "FROM python:3.11.5-bookworm

# System dependencies (including Rust toolchain for cryptography builds)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates \
    rustc cargo \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies with compatibility patches for known issues
COPY ./backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip
# Patch problematic dependencies to enable installation on Python 3.11
RUN sed -i 's/Celery==5.2.0/Celery<5.3/' /app/requirements.txt || true
RUN sed -i 's/scipy==1.8.1/scipy>=1.11.0,<1.12.0/' /app/requirements.txt || true

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Install local editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

# Copy backend code
COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

ENV PORT 8080
EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "docker/Dockerfile.backend", "content": "FROM python:3.10.13-bookworm

# System dependencies (including build tools)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies
COPY ./backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip
# Patch known problematic dependencies due to packaging metadata on older Python
RUN if grep -q "Celery==" /app/requirements.txt; then sed -i 's/Celery==5.2.0/Celery<5.3/' /app/requirements.txt; fi
RUN if grep -q "scipy==1.8.1" /app/requirements.txt; then sed -i 's/scipy==1.8.1/scipy>=1.11.0,<1.13.0/' /app/requirements.txt; fi

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Install local editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

# Copy backend code
COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

ENV PORT 8080
EXPOSE 8080

CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM python:3.11.6-bookworm

# System dependencies (including build tools for cryptography and native extensions)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential gcc libssl-dev libffi-dev curl ca-certificates \
    rustc cargo \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Install Python dependencies
COPY ./backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip
# Relax known problematic pins due to packaging metadata on older Python versions
RUN if grep -q "Celery==" /app/requirements.txt; then sed -i 's/Celery==5.2.0/Celery<5.3/' /app/requirements.txt; fi
RUN if grep -q "scipy==1.8.1" /app/requirements.txt; then sed -i 's/scipy==1.8.1/scipy>=1.11.0,<1.13.0/' /app/requirements.txt; fi

RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Install local editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

# Copy backend code
COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

ENV PORT 8080
EXPOSE 8080

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost:8080/openapi.json || exit 1

CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **File placement errors**  
   - *What happened:* The first Dockerfile was written to `docker/Dockerfile.backend`, but the build verification looked only at the repo root and failed (“No Dockerfile found at repo root”).  
   - *Fix:* Always provide a `Dockerfile` at the repository root so `VerifyBuild` can locate it.

2. **Missing HEALTHCHECK instruction**  
   - *What happened:* Multiple `build_failed` checks cited the absence of a `HEALTHCHECK` and container health reporting.  
   - *Fix:* Add a valid `HEALTHCHECK` instruction—e.g., use `curl` or `wget` to poll a `/healthz` or `/ready` endpoint in the running container.

3. **Python package resolution failures**  
   - *What happened:*  
     - Step 6: `ERROR: No matching distribution found for Celery==5.2.0`  
     - Step 12: `Could not find a version that satisfies the requirement scipy==1.8.1`  
   - *Fix:*  
     - Upgrade or loosen pins so compatible wheels exist for your chosen Python base. For Python 3.11+, use newer Celery (≥ 5.3) and SciPy (≥ 1.10.0).  
     - Verify requirements with `pip index versions <pkg>` before finalizing.

4. **Base image and Python compatibility**  
   - *What happened:* Versions 3.12, 3.11, and 3.10 were tried. Some packages (e.g., SciPy 1.8.1) lacked builds for newer Pythons.  
   - *Fix:* Pick a Python base that supports all dependencies—`python:3.10-bookworm` typically has best coverage. Adjust `requirements.txt` accordingly.

5. **Excessive build dependencies**  
   - *What happened:* Rust toolchain was installed just for cryptography; reviewers highlighted image bloat.  
   - *Fix:* Remove Rust if not strictly required. Use `pip install --only-binary :all:` where possible or precompiled wheels to avoid compiling.

6. **Container runtime readiness**  
   - *What happened:* Smoke tests failed because `uvicorn` wasn’t installed or app assumptions mismatched (“app serves at root path”).  
   - *Fix:* Ensure `uvicorn[standard]` or equivalent is installed in the final image and command runs the correct module/path (`uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000`).

7. **Security and best practices**  
   - *What happened:* `build_failed` notes flagged running as root.  
   - *Fix:* Add `RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /app` and `USER appuser`.

8. **HEALTHCHECK timing**  
   - *What happened:* Final smoke failure warned the `HEALTHCHECK` start-period (5 s) might be too short for FastAPI startup.  
   - *Fix:* Increase `--start-period` to 15–30 s or tune intervals accordingly.

9. **Database migrations (missing)**  
   - *What happened:* Final concerns mentioned “No explicit DB migration step.”  
   - *Fix:* Add an optional `CMD` or `ENTRYPOINT` step (or startup script) to run migrations before launching `uvicorn`.

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM python:3.12.13-bookworm

# Environment
ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Working directory
WORKDIR /app

# System dependencies (for building Python packages and common libs)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        gcc \
        libssl-dev \
        libffi-dev \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python dependencies
COPY backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip setuptools wheel \
    && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Copy project code and install editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

# Expose port and health check
EXPOSE 8080

# Create a non-root user for better security
RUN useradd -m appuser
RUN chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

# Start the FastAPI server with Uvicorn
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
"}

FROM python:3.11-bookworm

# Environment
ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

# Working directory
WORKDIR /app

# System dependencies (for building Python packages and common libs)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        gcc \
        libssl-dev \
        libffi-dev \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python dependencies
COPY backend/requirements.txt /app/requirements.txt
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip setuptools wheel \
    && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir -r /app/requirements.txt

# Copy project code and install editable packages
COPY ./oasst-shared /oasst-shared
RUN pip install -e /oasst-shared
COPY ./oasst-data /oasst-data
RUN pip install -e /oasst-data

COPY ./backend/alembic /app/alembic
COPY ./backend/alembic.ini /app/alembic.ini
COPY ./backend/main.py /app/main.py
COPY ./backend/import.py /app/import.py
COPY ./backend/export.py /app/export.py
COPY ./backend/rerank.py /app/rerank.py
COPY ./backend/oasst_backend /app/oasst_backend
COPY ./backend/test_data /app/test_data

# Expose port and health check
EXPOSE 8080

# Create a non-root user for better security
RUN useradd -m appuser
RUN chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser

# Healthcheck and startup
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=15s --retries=3 CMD curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/openapi.json || exit 1

# Start the FastAPI server with Uvicorn
CMD ["uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8080"]
